ontologysync-managed-footer: Footer message displayed on pages managed by OntologySync
ontologysync-footer-provenance: Provenance info in footer. $1 is bundle name, $2 is commit SHA
specialpages-group-labki: Group heading for Labki extensions on Special:SpecialPages
ontologysync: Name of the OntologySync special page
ontologysync-error-bundle-not-found: Error when a bundle ID is not found in the repo. $1 is the bundle ID
ontologysync-repo-not-cloned: Warning when repo is not cloned
ontologysync-repo-up-to-date: Text when repo is up to date
ontologysync-repo-status-unknown: Text when remote has not been checked yet
ontologysync-installed-ontology: Heading for the installed ontology card on overview
ontologysync-update-ontology: Button label for updating all installed bundles
ontologysync-add-bundle: Button label and heading for adding a new bundle
ontologysync-review-update-heading: Heading for the review update sub-page
ontologysync-review-install-heading: Heading for the review install sub-page. $1 is the bundle label
ontologysync-section-new: Collapsible section header for new pages. $1 is count
ontologysync-section-major: Collapsible section header for major changes. $1 is count
ontologysync-section-minor: Collapsible section header for minor changes. $1 is count
ontologysync-section-patch: Collapsible section header for patch changes. $1 is count
ontologysync-section-removed: Collapsible section header for removed pages. $1 is count
ontologysync-section-unchanged: Collapsible section header for unchanged pages. $1 is count
ontologysync-confirm-stage: Button label for confirming and staging changes
ontologysync-all-bundles-installed: Message when all repo bundles are already installed
ontologysync-no-updates: Message when all installed bundles are up to date
ontologysync-update-from-to: Commit range for update review. $1 is old commit, $2 is new commit
ontologysync-select-bundle: Link text to select a bundle for installation
ontologysync-review-stats: Summary stats for change review. $1 new, $2 changed, $3 removed, $4 unchanged
ontologysync-no-bundles-installed: Text when no bundles are installed
ontologysync-no-bundles-in-repo: Text when no bundles found in repo
ontologysync-not-installed: Text when bundle is not installed
ontologysync-up-to-date: Text when bundle is up to date
ontologysync-entities: Label for entity count in module list
ontologysync-stat-bundles: Label for bundles stat on overview
ontologysync-stat-modules: Label for modules stat on overview
ontologysync-stat-pages: Label for pages stat on overview
ontologysync-status-not-cloned: Status chip text when repo is not cloned
ontologysync-preview-guidance: Step-by-step guidance shown on the install preview page explaining the staging and import workflow
ontologysync-install-preview-heading: Heading for install preview. $1 is bundle label
ontologysync-staged-banner: Banner for staged bundle. $1 is bundle ID, $2 is commit SHA
ontologysync-no-managed-pages: Text when no pages are managed
ontologysync-action-reinstall: Button label for reinstalling bundle at same commit
ontologysync-remove-success: Success message after removing. $1 is bundle ID
ontologysync-status-update: Status text for page being updated
ontologysync-impact-changed: Change classification label for changed entities
ontologysync-impact-deleted: Change classification label for deleted entities
ontologysync-impact-unchanged: Change classification label for unchanged entities
ontologysync-impact-user-modified: Change classification label for user-modified entities
ontologysync-requires-review: Badge text for entities that require admin review
ontologysync-col-installed-commit: Column header for installed commit SHA
ontologysync-log-header: Header text for the OntologySync log
